query: What is Elon Musk's current net worth according to Bloomberg Billionaires Index in early July 2026? Has it recovered above $1 trillion after the late June 2026 tech selloff? Include recent Tesla and SpaceX share price and valuation trajectory.
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the summary:

**Direct answer to the question:** As of early July 2026, the Bloomberg Billionaires Index figure cited for Elon Musk is **~$932 billion — below $1 trillion** (Forbes: ~$916B). His net worth has **NOT durably recovered above $1 trillion** after the late-June 2026 tech/SpaceX selloff; he's oscillating right at the boundary, crossing above it on strong days (as on June 29) but sitting just under in the July reference snapshots.

**Key trajectory:**
- **The saga:** SpaceX IPO'd June 12 at $150 (~$2T market cap) → Musk became first trillionaire (~$1.1T) → SpaceX spiked to $225.64 on June 16, peaking his wealth at ~$1.45T intraday → SpaceX crashed ~31% + Tesla share restrictions → lost trillionaire status June 24 → regained it June 29 → back below in July snapshots.
- **Tesla (TSLA):** $399.31 on July 9, ~$1.50T market cap, ~20% below its 52-week high.
- **SpaceX (SPCX):** $150.62 on July 9, ~$1.98T market cap — essentially round-tripped back to its IPO debut price, ~33% below its June 16 peak. SpaceX's extreme volatility is the main driver of his net-worth swings around the $1T line.

All findings are cross-validated across Bloomberg (via Wikipedia), Forbes, Fortune, Fox Business, and Yahoo Finance market data, and captured in the structured output.

sources.title: Wealth of Elon Musk
sources.snippet: Estimated net worth of US$932 billion according to the Bloomberg Billionaires Index and $916 billion according to Forbes, as of July 2026... reaching an intraday peak of $1.4 trillion the week after the IPO but frequently dropping to under $1 trillion since late June.

sources.title: Elon Musk Just Lost His Trillionaire Status
sources.snippet: A slump in SpaceX's stock price and new restrictions on $116 billion of Musk's Tesla shares have dropped him from the four-comma-club.

sources.title: Musk Is A Trillionaire Again: SpaceX And Tesla Boost Net Worth By $60 Billion
sources.snippet: SpaceX jumped 7.6% and Tesla's surged by 8.6%, raising Musk's net worth by $62.3 billion to above $1 trillion. Musk holds 4.8 billion shares of SpaceX and another 350 million+ Tesla shares.

sources.title: Elon Musk's Net Worth Drops $350 Billion In Massive SpaceX Selloff—But He's Still A Trillionaire
sources.snippet: SpaceX plunged 16.4% Monday to under $155, down 31% since hitting a peak of $225.64 on June 16, dropping Musk's net worth from an all-time high of $1.45 trillion.

sources.title: SpaceX's drop off sees Elon Musk's net worth fall $240 billion
sources.snippet: The historic IPO earlier this month saw the richest man's net worth hit $1.1 trillion.

sources.title: Forbes Declares Elon Musk As The World's First Trillionaire
sources.snippet: SpaceX began trading on the Nasdaq at $150 per share, giving the company a nearly $2 trillion market cap, boosting Musk's fortune to an estimated $1.1 trillion.

sources.title: Space Exploration Technologies Corp. (SPCX) Stock Price
sources.snippet: SPCX current price 150.62, market cap ~1.98T, 52-week range 145.20-225.64, closed July 9 up 1.59%.

Elon Musk loses trillionaire status as tech rout hammers Tesla, SpaceX
sources.snippet: Musk remains the world's richest person by a wide margin, with Larry Page a distant second at $296B.

key_facts: Bloomberg Billionaires Index cites Elon Musk's net worth at ~$932 billion as of July 2026 — BELOW $1 trillion; Forbes cites ~$916 billion.
Musk has NOT durably recovered above $1 trillion after the late-June 2026 selloff; he oscillates right at the boundary (a live tracker put him at ~$1.05T on July 9, 2026).
SpaceX IPO'd on Nasdaq (SPCX) June 12, 2026 at $150/share (~$2T market cap), making Musk the world's first trillionaire (~$1.1T).
Musk's net worth briefly peaked at an intraday ~$1.45 trillion on/around June 16, 2026 when SpaceX hit its all-time high of $225.64 (+40% from debut).
Musk lost trillionaire status on June 24, 2026 due to SpaceX's ~31% slump plus new restrictions on $116 billion of his Tesla shares.
Musk regained trillionaire status June 29, 2026 as SpaceX (+7.6%) and Tesla (+8.6%) rallied, adding $62.3 billion to his net worth.
Tesla (TSLA) closed July 9, 2026 at $399.31, market cap ~$1.50 trillion, ~20% below its 52-week high of $498.83.
SpaceX (SPCX) closed July 9, 2026 at $150.62 (market cap ~$1.98T), essentially back to its IPO debut price and ~33% below its June 16 peak of $225.64.
Musk holds ~42% of SpaceX (~4.8 billion shares) and ~20% of Tesla (~350 million+ shares).
Per Wikipedia's summary, Musk's net worth has 'frequently dropped to under $1 trillion since late June' 2026.
